concepts.title: Decoder-only vs encoder-decoder tradeoff
concepts.hook: Decoder-only: simpler, more parameter-efficient for generation; encoder-decoder: enables bidirectional context.

concepts.title: GPT, Llama, Mistral, Qwen architectures
concepts.hook: Most modern LLMs are decoder-only; architectural choices vary (normalization, activation, attention type).

concepts.title: Encoder-decoder architecture and cross-attention
concepts.hook: Encoder processes input; decoder generates output conditioned on encoder.

concepts.title: T5 and BART models
concepts.hook: Encoder-decoder for seq2seq; effective for translation, summarization.

concepts.title: Mixture of Experts (MoE)
concepts.hook: Conditional computation; route tokens to expert subsets; sparse activation.

concepts.title: Jamba and hybrid SSM-Transformer models
concepts.hook: Combine attention layers with Mamba SSM layers; trade-offs in scaling and inference.

concepts.title: Scaling laws for loss and compute
concepts.hook: Loss ~ 1/N^alpha; predictable improvements with more data/compute.

concepts.title: Optimal batch sizes and data/compute tradeoff
concepts.hook: Chinchilla scaling: equal budget to compute and data.

concepts.title: Inference-scaling and test-time compute (o1, reasoning models)
concepts.hook: More test-time steps improve reasoning; o3 sets benchmarks.

concepts.title: Frontier model performance (GPT-4, Claude 3.7, Gemini 3)
concepts.hook: Understand where state-of-the-art sits; performance gaps on benchmarks.
